svg.title: Task Management System Architecture
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture diagram: Client tier (React frontend), Server tier (Express/Node backend), and Data tier (MongoDB), with JWT auth and request/response flow.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the TaskList component in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the TaskForm component in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the TaskDetails component in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the search and filter feature')
sendPrompt('Explain the Axios API service layer')
sendPrompt('Explain error handling in the backend')
sendPrompt('What is Mongoose and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('Explain the tasks collection schema in MongoDB')
sendPrompt('Explain the users collection schema in MongoDB')
